fields.label: Client Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sClientName1 FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Secondary Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sClientName2 FROM tblClient WHERE sClientName2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Address 1
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sMailAddr1 FROM tblClient WHERE sMailAddr1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Address 2
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sMailAddr2 FROM tblClient WHERE sMailAddr2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: City
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sMailCity FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: State
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sMailState FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Zip
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sMailZip FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Phone
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sPhoneVoice FROM tblClient WHERE sPhoneVoice IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Fax
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sPhoneFAX FROM tblClient WHERE sPhoneFAX IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Billing Email
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sBillTo FROM tblClient WHERE sBillTo IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Contract Number / Reference
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sReferenceNum FROM tblClient WHERE sReferenceNum IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Customer Since
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtClientSince, 101) FROM tblClient WHERE dtClientSince IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Sales Rep
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sr.sRepFirst + ' ' + sr.sRepLast, '') FROM tblClient c LEFT JOIN tblSalesRep sr ON sr.lSalesRepKey = c.lSalesRepKey ORDER BY c.sClientName1
fields.notes: FK: lSalesRepKey -> tblSalesRep; display = sRepFirst + sRepLast

fields.label: Pricing Category
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 pc.sPricingDescription FROM tblClient c LEFT JOIN tblPricingCategory pc ON pc.lPricingCategoryKey = c.lPricingCategoryKey ORDER BY c.sClientName1

fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 pt.sTermsDesc FROM tblClient c LEFT JOIN tblPaymentTerms pt ON pt.lPaymentTermsKey = c.lPaymentTermsKey ORDER BY c.sClientName1

fields.label: Distributor
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 d.sDistName1 FROM tblClient c LEFT JOIN tblDistributor d ON d.lDistributorKey = c.lDistributorKey WHERE c.lDistributorKey IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.sClientName1

fields.label: Active
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CAST(ISNULL(bActive, 0) AS INT) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Credit Limit
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 cl.sItemText AS CreditLimit FROM tblClient c LEFT JOIN vwSysCodesCreditLimit cl ON cl.lSystemCodesKey = c.lCreditLimitKey ORDER BY c.sClientName1
fields.notes: Dropdown: lCreditLimitKey -> vwSysCodesCreditLimit.lSystemCodesKey; display = sItemText. Options: 5,000 / 15,000 / 25,000 / 50,000 / 75,000 / 100,000

fields.label: Discount %
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 dblDiscountPct FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Markup %
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 dblMarkupPct FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1
fields.notes: VERIFY: dblMarkupPct column name not confirmed in controller

fields.label: Portal Months
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 nPortalMonths FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1
fields.notes: VERIFY: nPortalMonths column name not confirmed in controller

fields.label: Open Repairs (count)
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair r JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = r.lDepartmentKey WHERE d.lClientKey = c.lClientKey AND ISNULL(r.sRepairClosed,'N') != 'Y') FROM tblClient c ORDER BY c.sClientName1
fields.notes: Subquery count of open repairs across all client departments

fields.label: Revenue
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 1 SUM(ISNULL(i.dblTranAmount,0)) FROM tblInvoice i JOIN tblRepair r ON r.lRepairKey = i.lRepairKey JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = r.lDepartmentKey WHERE d.lClientKey = (SELECT TOP 1 lClientKey FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1)
fields.notes: VERIFY: join path and time window (YTD vs lifetime). Shown in header bar as dollar amount.

fields.label: Blind PS3
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bBlindPS3, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1
fields.notes: Hides PS3 pricing from customer-facing documents

fields.label: Req. Totals Only
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bRequisitionTotalsOnly, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Blind Totals On Final
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bBlindTotalsOnFinal, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Skip Metrics
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bSkipTracking, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1
fields.notes: VERIFY: controller maps both SkipMetrics and SkipTracking to bSkipTracking — may be a bug. Check if bSkipMetrics column exists.

fields.label: Skip Tracking
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bSkipTracking, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1
fields.notes: VERIFY: same column as Skip Metrics (bSkipTracking). Check if separate bSkipMetrics column exists.

fields.label: Email New Repairs
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bEmailNewRepairs, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: National Account
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bNationalAccount, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1
fields.notes: Note: bIsGPO in controller also reads from bNationalAccount

fields.label: PO Required
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sPORequired, '') FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Never Hold
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bNeverHold, 0) FROM tblClient ORDER BY sClientName1

fields.label: Comments
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 LEFT(mComments, 100) FROM tblClient WHERE mComments IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sClientName1
